Operation 'updateMembership' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lists updatable fields but lacks clarity on authentication requirements, return value, and partial update behavior. Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of what this operation does and what to expect.

data.current_description: Updates membership address, tax_id, billing email. Admins may also update email if not connected to a user.
data.description_suggestion: Updates membership information including address, tax_id, and billing email. Admins may also update the email field if the membership is not connected to a user account. Requires authentication with appropriate scope. Returns the updated membership object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Current description lists updatable fields but lacks clarity on authentication requirements, return value, and partial update behavior. Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of what this operation does and what to expect.

message: Operation 'deleteMembership' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects. Current description mentions the preference for cancellation but lacks clarity on authentication requirements and the irreversible nature of the operation. Enhanced to emphasize the destructive nature and provide clearer guidance for AI agents on when to use this versus cancellation.

data.current_description: Permanently deletes a membership. In most cases, prefer cancellation to preserve data. Returns 204 with empty body.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a membership record from the system. This operation is irreversible and removes all associated data. In most cases, cancellation (via the cancellation endpoint) is preferred to preserve historical data and member records. Requires admin authentication. Returns 204 No Content with empty body on success.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions the preference for cancellation but lacks clarity on authentication requirements and the irreversible nature of the operation. Enhanced to emphasize the destructive nature and provide clearer guidance for AI agents on when to use this versus cancellation.

message: Operation 'cancelMembership' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too brief and vague. Improved summary to clarify the date-based nature of the operation. Enhanced description to explain the purpose (scheduling termination), admin requirement, data preservation benefit, expected inputs (cancellation date), and return value for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Cancels a membership at a given date as admin.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a membership effective at a specified date. Admin-only operation. Allows scheduling membership termination for a future date while preserving member and historical data. Requires authentication with admin scope. Accepts a request body specifying the cancellation date. Returns the updated membership object with cancellation status and effective date.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and vague. Improved summary to clarify the date-based nature of the operation. Enhanced description to explain the purpose (scheduling termination), admin requirement, data preservation benefit, expected inputs (cancellation date), and return value for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'undoCancellation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description lacks essential context about when this operation can be used (before cancellation takes effect), admin requirement, and what is returned. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's constraints and effects.

data.current_description: Undoes a membership cancellation.
data.description_suggestion: Reverses a previously scheduled membership cancellation, restoring the membership to active status. Admin-only operation. Can only be used if the membership cancellation has not yet taken effect. Requires authentication with admin scope. Returns the updated membership object with cancellation status removed.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks essential context about when this operation can be used (before cancellation takes effect), admin requirement, and what is returned. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's constraints and effects.

message: Operation 'confirmMembership' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too vague about what 'confirm' means in this context. Clarified that this activates/finalizes a membership, added context about status transition, authentication requirements, and return value to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Confirms a member at a space. Admin only.
data.description_suggestion: Confirms and activates a membership at a space, transitioning it from pending to active status. Admin-only operation. Used to finalize membership setup after creation. Requires authentication with admin scope. Returns the confirmed membership object with status set to active and HTTP 201 Created.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague about what 'confirm' means in this context. Clarified that this activates/finalizes a membership, added context about status transition, authentication requirements, and return value to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'listCanceledMemberships' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description uses imprecise terminology ('members' instead of 'memberships') and lacks details about query parameters, use case, and return format. Improved terminology consistency, clarified that it returns membership objects, explained the purpose, and specified that date range parameters are required.

data.current_description: Returns all members that canceled in the given timespan.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all memberships that were canceled within a specified timespan. Useful for reporting and auditing membership cancellations. Requires authentication. Accepts query parameters to specify the start and end dates for the cancellation period. Returns an array of membership objects for all memberships canceled during the specified period.
data.reasoning: Current description uses imprecise terminology ('members' instead of 'memberships') and lacks details about query parameters, use case, and return format. Improved terminology consistency, clarified that it returns membership objects, explained the purpose, and specified that date range parameters are required.

message: Operation 'getSpaceDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about what 'details' means and what the response contains. Enhanced version specifies the Space schema return type and clarifies the public nature of the endpoint for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns details for a coworking space. No authentication required.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a coworking space identified by subdomain. Returns a Space object containing properties such as name, address, amenities, and configuration. No authentication required. Public endpoint.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about what 'details' means and what the response contains. Enhanced version specifies the Space schema return type and clarifies the public nature of the endpoint for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateSpace' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description lacks information about what is returned and clarification that partial updates are supported. Added return type and side effect details to help AI agents understand the operation's full behavior.

data.current_description: Updates a coworking space. Requires authentication as admin with write scope.
data.description_suggestion: Updates coworking space configuration identified by subdomain. Accepts a SpaceUpdateRequest with fields to modify (partial updates supported). Requires admin authentication with write scope. Returns the updated Space object. Only provided fields will be modified; omitted fields remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks information about what is returned and clarification that partial updates are supported. Added return type and side effect details to help AI agents understand the operation's full behavior.

message: Operation 'listMemberships' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'List members' is vague and doesn't indicate filtering capabilities. Description lacks clarity about default behavior and return type. Enhanced version clarifies default behavior, explains each parameter's purpose, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates the Membership array response for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description:
Returns current members of a space. Requires admin access.

Optional params:
- `as_of`: Return members active at given date
- `all=true`: Return all memberships (past, present, future)
- `ids`: Comma-separated membership IDs
- `attributes`: Comma-separated list of attributes to return
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of memberships for a space with flexible filtering options. By default returns current active members. Supports optional parameters: `as_of` (return members active on a specific date), `all=true` (include past and future memberships), `ids` (filter by specific membership IDs), and `attributes` (select specific fields to return). Requires admin authentication. Returns an array of Membership objects.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'List members' is vague and doesn't indicate filtering capabilities. Description lacks clarity about default behavior and return type. Enhanced version clarifies default behavior, explains each parameter's purpose, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates the Membership array response for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createMembership' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Original provides minimal context about inputs, outputs, or side effects. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, authentication requirements, return type, and clarifies that the member is immediately activated, enabling AI agents to understand the full operation scope.

data.current_description: Creates a new membership as admin.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new membership for a space as an admin. Accepts a MembershipCreateRequest containing member details such as name, email, plan selection, and billing information. Requires admin authentication with write scope. Returns the created Membership object with assigned ID and activation status. The new member is immediately added to the space's member list.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Original provides minimal context about inputs, outputs, or side effects. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, authentication requirements, return type, and clarifies that the member is immediately activated, enabling AI agents to understand the full operation scope.

message: Operation 'getMembership' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks specificity about what 'details' are returned. Enhanced version specifies the Membership schema return type and clarifies the access control model (admin or owner) for better AI agent understanding of authorization requirements.

data.current_description: Returns a single membership by ID. Requires admin or the membership owner.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a single membership identified by ID. Returns a Membership object containing member profile, plan details, billing status, and membership history. Accessible to admin users or the membership owner. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks specificity about what 'details' are returned. Enhanced version specifies the Membership schema return type and clarifies the access control model (admin or owner) for better AI agent understanding of authorization requirements.

Returns 204 No Content with empty body on success.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions the preference for cancellation but lacks clarity on authentication requirements and the irreversible nature of the operation. Enhanced to emphasize the destructive nature and provide clearer guidance for AI agents on when to use this versus cancellation.

data.current_description:
Returns current members of a space. Requires admin access.

Optional params:
- `as_of`: Return members active at given date
- `all=true`: Return all memberships (past, present, future)
- `ids`: Comma-separated membership IDs
- `attributes`: Comma-separated list of attributes to return
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of memberships for a space with flexible filtering options. By default returns current active members. Supports optional parameters: `as_of` (return members active on a specific date), `all=true` (include past and future memberships), `ids` (filter by specific membership IDs), and `attributes` (select specific fields to return). Requires admin authentication. Returns an array of Membership objects.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'List members' is vague and doesn't indicate filtering capabilities. Description lacks clarity about default behavior and return type. Enhanced version clarifies default behavior, explains each parameter's purpose, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates the Membership array response for better AI agent decision-making.
